plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and meet the mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate leveraged ETF exposure and exit positions below stop.
Reduce SMH to 5% to cut downtrending semiconductor risk.
Increase QQQI to 25% for more income and broad market exposure.
Increase QQQ to 20% to further enhance broad index exposure.
This plan aims for capital preservation and a large cash buffer.
conservative.read: This conservative plan targets a modest ~1.5%/month, prioritizing capital preservation. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration, aiming for lower drawdown. Expect limited upside potential in exchange for reduced risk.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to reduce leveraged ETF exposure and exit positions below stop.
Reduce SMH to 8% to manage risk in a downtrending sector.
Increase CRWD to 18% to lean into a performing AI/Software name.
Buy AMD at 5% as a strong scanner setup.
This plan targets risk-first growth with a moderate cash buffer.
balanced.read: This balanced plan aims for ~2.5%/month, focusing on risk-first growth. It reduces overall leverage and concentration while adding to performing assets and strong new setups. Expect moderate swings with a focus on sustainable growth.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to exit positions below stop and reallocate capital.
Maximize CRWD to 25% to lean into a strong AI/Software performer.
Buy AMD at 10% as a top-scoring scanner setup.
Reduce SMH to 5% to manage risk in a downtrending sector.
This plan uses leverage and concentration for aggressive growth.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4%/month, aiming for stretched growth. It leverages strong performers and top scanner setups, but this raises both upside and drawdown potential. Be aware of daily leveraged ETF decay and the potential for significant, rapid losses with strict stop discipline.

plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and meet the mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate leveraged ETF exposure and exit positions below stop.
Sell all SMH to exit high-beta semiconductor exposure.
Reduce CRWD to 5% to minimize high-beta tech exposure.
Increase QQQI to 40% to maximize income-focused ETF exposure.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions and low drawdown.
income.read: This income plan targets ~1%/month, prioritizing steady distributions and capital preservation. It significantly reduces leverage and high-beta single names, focusing on income-generating ETFs and broad index. Distributions are variable and NAV can still fall in a selloff; this is cash-like income, not a savings account.
